panels.description: 容器 CPU 使用量相对于限制值的百分比。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 CPU Limit 的配置。
panels.title: CPU Usage (%)

targets.expr: max (rate (container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total{image!="", container!="", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (container,pod) / max (rate (container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{image!="", container!="", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (container,pod) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: 容器 WSS 内存使用量相对于限制量的比例。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 Memory Limit 的配置。

targets.expr: (max(container_memory_working_set_bytes{pod=~"$pod",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace",node=~"$node"}) by (pod,namespace,container)/ max(kube_pod_container_resource_limits_memory_bytes{pod=~"$pod",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace",node=~"$node"}) by (pod,namespace, container) * 100) <= 100 or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Usage WSS/Limit (%)

panels.description: 容器 Usage 内存使用量相对于限制量的比例。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 Memory Limit 的配置。
panels.title: Usage/Limit (%)

panels.description: 容器 RSS 内存使用量相对于限制量的比例。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 Memory Limit 的配置。

targets.expr: (max(container_memory_rss{pod=~"$pod",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace",node=~"$node"}) by (pod,namespace,container)/ sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits_memory_bytes{pod=~"$pod",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace",node=~"$node"}) by (pod,namespace, container) * 100) <= 100 or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Usage RSS/Limit (%)

targets.expr: max (increase (container_network_receive_packets_dropped_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface) / max (increase (container_network_receive_packets_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface)

max (increase (container_network_receive_errors_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface) / max (increase (container_network_receive_packets_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface)

max (increase (container_network_transmit_packets_dropped_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface) / max (increase (container_network_transmit_packets_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface)

max (increase (container_network_transmit_errors_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface) / max (increase (container_network_receive_packets_total{id!="/", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod",node=~"$node"}[1m])) by (pod,interface)

avg by (namespace, node, pod) (ephemeral_storage_pod_usage_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", pod=~"$pod"}) /
avg by (namespace, node, pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="ephemeral_storage"})

avg by (namespace, node, pod) (ephemeral_storage_pod_inodes_used{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", pod=~"$pod"}) /
avg by (namespace, node, pod) (ephemeral_storage_pod_inodes_total)
